Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Class FunctionalBlockContractPO

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractPO
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.FunctionalBlockContractPO
All Implemented Interfaces:
ContractPO, IPersistablePO, ProofOblInput
public class FunctionalBlockContractPO extends AbstractPO implements ContractPO
A proof obligation for a FunctionalBlockContract.

  • Constructor Details

    • FunctionalBlockContractPO

      public FunctionalBlockContractPO(InitConfig initConfig, FunctionalBlockContract contract)
      Parameters:
      initConfig - the initial proof configuration.
      contract - the contract from which this PO is generated.

  • Method Details

    • createLoaderConfig

      public Configuration createLoaderConfig()
      Description copied from class: AbstractPO
      This method is called by a ProofSaver to store the proof specific settings in the given Properties. The stored settings have to contain all information required to instantiate the proof obligation again and this instance should create the same Sequent (if code and specifications are unchanged).
      Specified by:
      createLoaderConfig in interface IPersistablePO
      Overrides:
      createLoaderConfig in class AbstractPO
      Returns:

      Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput

      Specified by:

      Overrides:
